- gcc

- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot

- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version
zlib:
- '1'

name: mysql-connector-python

about.description:
MySQL Connector/Python is a standardized database driver for Python

about.summary: Python driver for communicating with MySQL servers

about.description:
MySQL Connector/Python is a standardized database driver for Python

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: mysql-connector-python
  version: "9.6.0"
  major_minor: ${{ (version | split('.'))[:2] | join('.') }}

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/mysql/mysql-connector-python/archive/${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 8d1b2a52a8183bbfee20ac8be0e31a2420504a35f9223badd0756627b5226ecf
  patches:
    - patches/0001-Typecast-password-to-const-char-explicitly-py3.patch
    - patches/0002-Fix-location-for-searching-mysql-headers-and-libs-on.patch
    - patches/0003-Fix-indentation-for-common-flags.patch
    - patches/0004-Revert-Fix-MacOS-wheels-platform-tag.patch
    - patches/0005-Delete-openssl-vendor-ed-libs-only-if-provided.patch

build:
  number: 1

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - pkg-config
  host:
    - python
    - pip
    - setuptools
    - mysql-devel ${{ major_minor }}.*
    - mysql-client ${{ major_minor }}.*
    - if: linux
      then: zlib
  run:
    - python
  ignore_run_exports:
    from_package:
      # This is used for linking and building some tools but there is no C++ dependency on the final binaries.
      - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
  run_constraints:
    - mysql-client ${{ major_minor }}.*

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - mysql
        - mysql.connector
      pip_check: true

about:
  license: GPL-2.0-or-later WITH Universal-FOSS-exception-1.0
  license_file: LICENSE.txt
  summary: Python driver for communicating with MySQL servers
  description: |
    MySQL Connector/Python is a standardized database driver for Python
    platforms and development.
  homepage: https://dev.mysql.com/doc/connector-python/en/
  repository: https://github.com/mysql/mysql-connector-python
  documentation: http://dev.mysql.com/doc/connector-python/en/index.html

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - synapticarbors
    - nehaljwani
    - xhochy

about.description:
MySQL Connector/Python is a standardized database driver for Python
platforms and development.
about.summary: Python driver for communicating with MySQL servers
